transcript: Speaker A (AI): Let's practice your English. Speaker B (Human): Hn.. I mean, yes..yes. Speaker A (AI): What's your name? Speaker B (Human): I Aarav. Speaker A (AI): You'd say- "My name is Aarav." Speaker B (Human): My name is Aarav. Speaker A (AI): Tell me, how old are you? Speaker B (Human): 25. Speaker A (AI): You mean, "I am 25 years old." Speaker B (Human): Sorry, yes I am 25 years old. Speaker A (AI): Where are you from? Speaker B (Human): Odisha. Speaker A (AI): Do you mean, "I am from Odisha?" Speaker B (Human): Yes, I am from Odisha. Par main English main fluent kese banu? [But how do I become fluent in English?] Speaker A (AI): Daily practice kar ke. [By practicing daily.] Speaker B (Human): Par mere pass personal teacher ke liye paisa nahi hai. [But I don't have money for a personal teacher.] Speaker A (AI): My Sivi ka AI, tumhara personal teacher ban sakta hai aur trial sirf 1rs main. [My Sivi's AI can become your personal teacher, and the trial is just for 1 rupee.] Speaker B (Human): 1 rs main? [For 1 rupee?] Speaker A (AI): 50 lakh se zyada log MySivi ke madad se English sikh chuke hain. Tum bhi seekh lo. Aur download karne ke liye is video ke link pe click karo aur install karo. [More than 50 lakh people have learned English with the help of MySivi. You should learn too. And to download, click on the link in this video and install.]
on_screen_text: Let's practice your English. Hn.. I mean, yes..yes. What's your name? I Aarav. My name is Aarav. Tell me, how old are you. 25. I am 25 years old. Sorry, yes i am 25 years old. Where are you from? Odisha. I am from Odisha. Yes, I am from Odisha. par main English main fluent kese banu? Daily practice kar ke. Par mere pass personal teacher ke liye paisa nahi hai. My Sivi ka AI, tumhara personal teacher ban sakta hai aur trial sirf 1rs main. 1 rs main? 50 lakh se zyada log MySivi ke madad se English sikh chuke hain. Tum bhi seekh lo. Aur download karne ke liye is video ke link pe click karo aur install karo.
summary: A young man practices English with an AI avatar on the MySivi app, which corrects his grammar. When he mentions budget constraints, the AI offers a trial for just 1 rupee, highlighting its large user base. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app.
